title: Senator Tony Strickland ( R-Huntington Beach ) warns residents of the Senate District 36 th of a proposed mandate from the South Coast Air Quality Management District (SCAQMD), whi
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: The proposed amendments to Rule 1111 and 1121 aim to replace natural gas furnaces and water heaters in favor of all-electric units by 2026.
The expense to upgrade to all-electric space and water heaters can range from $1,500 to $47,000 per household.
The cost of living for Californians is 42% higher than the national average.
Residents in the district have expressed struggles to afford basic necessities like food, rent, and gas due to overregulation.
The South Coast Air Quality Management District creates mandates with minimal transparency and input from Californians.
